# Curated Single-cell and Spatial Omics Techniques from LinkedIn Posts

This handbook is organized by analysis category. Methods that belong to multiple categories are intentionally repeated with identical metadata. Links marked **CSV** were present in the LinkedIn CSV; links marked **External (not present in CSV)** were added from external knowledge/search and should be treated as curated additions.

# Index

## Single-cell RNA-seq

- Experimental Technologies
- Preprocessing & Quality Control
- Normalization & Batch Integration
- Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering
- Cell Type Annotation
- Differential Expression & Marker Discovery
- Trajectory Inference & Pseudotime
- RNA Velocity
- Gene Regulatory Network Inference
- Cell–Cell Communication
- Functional Enrichment & Pathway Analysis
- Multimodal Integration
- Simulation & Benchmarking
- Visualization & Interactive Exploration

## Spatial Omics

- Experimental Technologies
- Preprocessing & Quality Control
- Cell Segmentation
- Spatial Cell Type Annotation
- Spatial Differential Expression
- Spatially Variable Genes
- Spatial Domains & Tissue Architecture
- Spatial Cell–Cell Communication
- Neighborhood & Microenvironment Analysis
- Colocalization & Spatial Pattern Analysis
- Multi-sample Spatial Integration
- Visualization & Interactive Exploration

## Single-cell & Spatial Integration

- Reference-based Deconvolution
- Cell Mapping & Label Transfer
- Spatial Cell Mapping & Reconstruction
- Probabilistic Integration
- Multimodal Integration
- Benchmarking & Method Evaluation

# Single-cell RNA-seq

## Experimental Technologies

### TAP-seq

**Categories**
- Single-cell RNA-seq → Cell Type Annotation
- Single-cell RNA-seq → Experimental Technologies
- Single-cell RNA-seq → Functional Enrichment & Pathway Analysis
- Single-cell RNA-seq → Gene Regulatory Network Inference

**Description**
TAP-seq is an experimental single-cell technology for profiling cellular molecular phenotypes.
